description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a combination of flat and gable roofs, featuring a mix of white and gray exterior walls. The front facade includes a balcony with a metal railing, large sliding glass doors, and a tiled porch area. The house has multiple large windows, some with black frames, providing ample natural light to the interior. There is a garage attached to one side, with a visible driveway and a small garden bed. The rear of the house is simpler, with fewer windows and a plain wall, while the side view reveals a staircase leading to the upper floor and a small balcony. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces and modern aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with flat and gable roofs, large windows, a balcony, and an attached garage. The exterior features white and gray walls with a tiled porch and clean geometric lines.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a plain white wall, a small window, and the back door with minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_1: Side view revealing large windows, a staircase to the upper floor, a small balcony, and the attached garage.
description_view_2: Front view with a prominent balcony, large sliding glass doors, tiled porch, and main entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, garden bed, and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a modern door, tiled porch, balcony above, and minimal decorative elements.
